name: release-ops
description: Testing plugin for release readiness checks, branch hygiene, and handoff prep.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare a release pass and tighten the final handoff
interface.longDescription: Use Release Ops to check git state, shape release notes, and produce a simple list of validation steps before a test deployment or PR handoff.
defaultPrompt: Check this repo for release readiness issues.
Draft release notes from the recent changes.
List the validation steps before I push this branch.
